title: arthropteris anniana
intro: Arthropteris anniana is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and combat infections. The leaves of Arthropteris anniana can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or salve, and are used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions.
